__doc: git pull → 依存インストール → プロセス再起動 まで自動化
title: Git Pull & Deploy

metadata.author: LuciFeR0x0systeM
metadata.description: Node / Python / 汎用アプリのゼロダウンタイムデプロイ

execution_sequence.label: 最新コード取得
execution_sequence.command: cd {{APP_DIR}} && git fetch origin && git stash && git checkout {{GIT_BRANCH}} && git pull origin {{GIT_BRANCH}} && echo 'PULL_OK' && git log -1 --oneline

execution_sequence.label: 依存パッケージ更新
execution_sequence.command: cd {{APP_DIR}} && if [ '{{APP_TYPE}}' = 'node' ]; then npm install --production 2>&1; elif [ '{{APP_TYPE}}' = 'python' ]; then pip3 install -r requirements.txt 2>&1; else echo 'SKIP_DEPS'; fi

execution_sequence.label: 現行プロセスのバックアップ記録
プロセス再起動
execution_sequence.command: if command -v pm2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then pm2 restart {{PROCESS_NAME}} || pm2 start {{START_CMD}} --name {{PROCESS_NAME}}; elif command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then systemctl restart {{PROCESS_NAME}}; else pkill -f {{PROCESS_NAME}} 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd {{APP_DIR}} && nohup {{START_CMD}} > /var/log/{{PROCESS_NAME}}.log 2>&1 &; fi

execution_sequence.label: 起動確認 (10秒待機)
execution_sequence.command: sleep 10 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP:%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000/health 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO_HEALTH_ENDPOINT — process check:' && ps aux | grep {{PROCESS_NAME}} | grep -v grep | head -3
